Come Sip With Us At the
just add honey retail café
Welcome to Just Add Honey Tea Company, a cozy café and retail shop located on the Atlanta BeltLine in between Old Fourth Ward and Inman Park. Whether you’re searching for the best tea in Atlanta, a quiet spot for locally roasted coffee, or things to do in Atlanta, you’ll find it here.
We offer a carefully curated selection of loose leaf teas, coffee, desserts, books, and gifts—all in a warm, welcoming space. Browse our tea accessories, sip in our café, or plan a tea party with friends.
Looking for a relaxing afternoon or a unique gathering spot? Visit our tea and coffee shop on the BeltLine. Pinkies up optional 😉.

menu | in store events
CAN'T DECIDE WHAT YOU'D LIKE TO ENJOY!??
Visit our retail café on the Atlanta BeltLine—a cozy space nestled in Old Fourth Ward and Inman Park, where tea lovers come to sip, explore, and unwind.
Enjoy indoor seating, relax on our sunny outdoor patio, or pop in for your favorite blend to-go. Our TEAm is always ready with suggestions to help you discover a new favorite.
✨

--- Page: /pages/about-us ---
about us
– Just Add Honey Tea Company
Skip to content
Our Story
FANCY WITHOUT THE FUSS
SIP TEA DIFFERENTLY
Just Add Honey Tea Company was created by tea lovers.
We wanted to enjoy tea and knew that there was more out there than what was on the shelves. Instant tea, artificially flavored, penny-pinched tea bags, 5 o’clock teas, feel better teas, etc, etc.  WE HAD THEM ALL!
While scouring places for the perfect cup of tea, we decided we would MAKE what we wanted. Combining flavors from around the world that was pleasing to the palate while still keeping it light and interesting,
just add honey tea company
was born.
Shop Tea & Accessories
We create fresh, fun, and sophisticated flavors combined with stimulating and soothing ingredients in every cup.
Since 2006,
just add honey
creates fresh, fun, and sophisticated flavors combined with stimulating and soothing ingredients in every cup. Our ingredients are all natural, pure, and easily recognized. Nothing is changed or altered. Our mission is to bring thoughtfully blended teas to your doorstep.
j
ust add honey tea company
wants you to enjoy the best, freshest, and most flavorful teas with every sip. Whether it is a black tea, herbal tea, fruit tea or specialty tea, just add honey wants you to enjoy every cup. Anytime. Anywhere.
just add honey
uses tea to connect with communiTEA. You can find their thoughtful blends in their Atlanta flagship store, online, and in many speciality stores, restaurants, coffee shops, and cafes around the United States.
